feat.name: Ancestral Form
feat.text: Casting your memory back deep into the past, you take the form of an ancestral guardian. You can cast *animal form* on yourself as a 3rd-rank primal innate spell once per day. You must choose the crocodile form.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.
